```{r}
#| label: fig-overtime-npr
#| cache: true
#| cache.comments: false
#| fig-cap: "Use of SGLT2i over time - NPR population"

overtime_npr <- bind_rows(
  overtime_prev_npr %>% mutate(type = 1),
  overtime_inc_npr %>% mutate(type = 2),
  overtime_disc_npr %>% mutate(type = 3)
) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type,
    levels = 1:3,
    labels = c("Prevalent use", "Initiation", "Discontinuation")
  )) %>%
  filter(time >= ymd("2022-10-01"))

datalabel <- overtime_npr %>%
  filter(day(time) == 1) %>%
  arrange(type, time) %>%
  slice(seq(3, n(), 3))

p <- ggplot(
  overtime_npr,
  aes(x = time, y = per, color = type)
) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(global_cols[1:3])) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%d/%m/%y"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100), breaks = seq(0, 100, 25) # , expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(
      color = "lightgrey",
      linewidth = 0.5,
      linetype = 2
    ),
    text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
  ) +
  labs(x = "Day/Month/Year", y = "Percent (%)") +
  geom_text_repel(data = datalabel, aes(x = time, y = per, label = perprint, color = type), show.legend = FALSE, size = 5, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = F, direction = "y")

if (pptx) {
  create_pptx(p)
}
p
```
